Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_DisableSkillBo: Skill books no longer appear as loot anywhere (houses, libraries, shops, vehicles...).
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_SpawnRemovalSc: Which mods' skill books are removed from loot.
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_AllowWritingVa: Let players write the 24 vanilla skill books from their own skill level.
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_AllowWritingMo: Let players write skill books added by other mods (e.g. Lifestyle: Cleaning, Music, Dancing).
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_AllowPassiveSk: Create and allow writing books for Strength, Fitness, Sprinting, Lightfooted, Nimble and Sneaking. These have no vanilla book.
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_AllowCombatSki: Create and allow writing books for Axe, Long Blunt, Short Blunt, Short Blade and Spear. These have no vanilla book.
Sandbox_SkillBooksWriting_BaseWriteTime_: Action time (tenths of a second) for writing a tier-1 book. Higher tiers scale by the multiplier below.
